meta.title: Home & tasks
meta.description: Family planning — tasks, pets, and shopping

sync.invalidDataHint: Restart `npm start`, wait until logs say Fabric Hub listening, then Retry — older saves repair automatically on startup.
sync.hint: The API must be running (see README). Command:

familyManage.heading: Household
familyManage.intro: Name your home, leave a short description for everyone, and manage who appears on the tabs.
familyManage.descriptionPlaceholder: House rules, reminders, or a short note for your home screens…
familyManage.shoppingPhasesHeading: Show shopping list on the “All” tab during:
familyManage.shoppingPhasesHint: Open shopping rows in each column appear only in these periods (same phases as the clock badge in the header). Clear a phase if you don’t want shopping shown on “All” then.
familyManage.shoppingPhasesAria: Times of day when shopping appears on the All tab

familySetup.subtitle: Household setup
familySetup.heading: Welcome — set up your home
familySetup.hint: This node stores one household. You will be the organizer; add others later under Family members.
familySetup.federationHint: The Fabric Hub also records this home in the federation registry (along with others). Details are on the "Network" tab.
familySetup.publicHint: Publish our tasks on the network so other households can complete them. When connected, your hub can also earn Bitcoin by completing tasks for other families. You can change this anytime under Network.

ownerToken.subtitle: Owner credential
ownerToken.heading: Save your signed owner token
ownerToken.body: This hub created a Fabric signing key and issued a token for your organizer account. Keep a file copy — you may need it if this browser’s storage is cleared or on a new device.
ownerToken.offlineHint: A copy is stored in this browser’s local storage; the file backup helps with the offline-first workflows we are polishing next.
ownerToken.loading: Asking the hub to sign your token…
ownerToken.error: Could not obtain the signed token.
ownerToken.errorHint: Check that the Hub is running (see README). If you just finished setup, wait a moment and retry — your save might still be syncing.

adminPanel.title: Organizer
adminPanel.intro: This browser has your household organizer credential. Use it for Fabric settings and backups.
adminPanel.networkHint: Share tasks with other households only when you opt in below and mark individual tasks.
adminPanel.bitcoinFeaturesHint: Controls Bitcoin-specific shopping UI: budget, Bitcoin funding, and payout requests. When off, these elements are hidden.
adminPanel.securityHint: Save another copy of your signed owner token (same as onboarding).

wallet.heading: Bitcoin wallet
wallet.hint: Lightning and on-chain services exposed by this hub.
wallet.rateError: Could not load exchange rates ({{detail}}). Fiat reference hidden; amounts are in satoshis.

bitcoinTools.heading: Bitcoin tools
bitcoinTools.hint: Look up transactions via this Hub, request coins from the public faucet at hub.fabric.pub, or use the local Hub regtest faucet.
bitcoinTools.explorerHint: Enter a 64-character transaction id (getrawtransaction via Hub; txindex helps for mempool or deep history).
bitcoinTools.explorerInvalidTxid: Enter a valid 64-character hex transaction id.
bitcoinTools.explorerNotFound: Transaction not found or txindex is disabled on this Hub.
bitcoinTools.publicFaucetHint: Request coins from the public Fabric Hub. Use an address on that Hub’s Bitcoin network—a local regtest bcrt1… address may not work. Max {{maxSats}} sats per request.
bitcoinTools.faucetHint: Requests satoshis from the Hub beacon wallet to an address (regtest only; max {{maxSats}} sats per tap).
bitcoinTools.faucetRegtestOnly: The faucet runs only when this Hub’s Bitcoin RPC is on regtest.

payout.contextMember: Request from a family member tab.
payout.dialogIntro: Ask the organizer to send sats from the household wallet.
payout.noOwnerYet: Finish organizer setup to review payout requests.
payout.proposalsHint: Approve or reject requests from family members.

users.heading: Family members
users.hint: People appear as tabs and task assignees in this order. Drag by the grip to reorder them everywhere. Removing someone reassigns their tasks and shopping to the first person in the list.
users.removeConfirmBody: Remove member "{{name}}"? Their tasks and shopping will be reassigned to the first person in the list.

network.heading: Fabric network
network.hint: WebSocket + WebRTC signaling uses the Fabric Hub that also hosts your saved tasks (/api). In development the Hub runs on a different port than Vite — use VITE_HUB_ADDRESS from npm run dev.
network.sameOriginHint: Hub address defaults to this page’s origin when unset (works when the app is served by the Hub).
network.federationFamilyHint: This Family Tasks hub registers one household federation (familytasks-household). The full federation catalog is Hub-wide — see federation registry JSON in the Distributed services.
network.publicHint: As the organizer, you can list this home’s tasks on the Fabric network for cross-household completion. Turning this on does not share shopping or pet care until we wire task offers end-to-end.
network.peersHint: Add another Hub’s Fabric P2P listen address (host:port; default Fabric port is 7777). The list refreshes periodically.
network.peersEmpty: No peers yet — add one above.
network.peersLoadError: Could not load the peer list. Use the Hub’s HTTP origin or proxy /services to this Hub in development.
network.addPeerError: Could not add peer — check address and Hub logs.
network.peerDetailMetadataEmpty: No metadata from the hub for this peer.
network.peerSelectHint: Click a row to open its Peer View page with full id, status line, and metadata.
network.peerViewStale: This peer is no longer in the hub list (disconnected or removed). Refresh or return to the list.
network.peerViewInvalid: This peer link is invalid; go back to Known peers.

overview.currentHintBefore: Assignments and pets by time of day:

personView.nowHint: What needs to be done soon.
personView.nowEmpty: Quiet right now — check "Later today" or add a task.
personView.laterHint: These tasks are for today but scheduled for later.
personView.dailyCheckbox: Every day (back on the plan after the day rolls over)

shopTab.hintAfterBuy: Everything here is expected at home. Remove what you don't need (trash icon).
shopTab.empty: Nothing yet — add an item in the form below.
shopTab.buyAgainHint: Check the fridge and ask to buy what has run out.
shopTab.addHint: One shared family list: whoever is assigned to buy sees it under "Relevant now" on their tab.

doneConfirm.title: Undo?
doneConfirm.undoPet: Put pet care back on the plan
doneConfirm.toastTask: Completion cleared — task is active again.
doneConfirm.toastPet: Completion cleared — pet task is planned again.
doneConfirm.toastShop: Completion cleared — purchase is back on the list.

removeConfirm.title: Delete?
removeConfirm.shopBody: «{{title}}» will move to "Buy again" with status "Declined".
removeConfirm.repurchaseBody: «{{title}}» will no longer appear under "Buy again".

toasts.walkSkipped: OK — one walk slot may count as skipped for the day. All good.
toasts.shopAdded: Item added to the shared list.
toasts.repurchaseOpen: «{{title}}» is waiting to be bought again.

tasksManage.title: Family tasks
tasksManage.hint: Editing and deleting — no shopping list or pets, only your assignments.
tasksManage.empty: No tasks yet — add them from a family member's tab.
tasksManage.validationTimeInvalid: Enter a valid time in HH:MM format.
tasksManage.anyAssigneeDone: Any selected member can complete it
tasksManage.deleteConfirm: Delete task «{{title}}»? This cannot be undone.
tasksManage.publishOnFabricHint: Other households on Fabric can see this task when sharing is on.
tasksManage.hintFooter: To create a task, leave this panel and open a family tab — "Quick task" block.

taskRow.notesPlaceholder: Details: what to bring, where, for how long…
taskRow.undoDoneAria: Done today. Click to open undo confirmation.
taskRow.doneAria: Done. Click to open undo confirmation.
taskRow.publishOnFabricHint: Visible to other households on Fabric. Unchecked = stays private to your home.

taskRequest.title: Whom to ask
taskRequest.hint: Task "{{title}}" will be considered done if any selected member completes it.

shopRow.fundHint: Send at least this amount to the hub wallet receive address below.
shopRow.fundSetBudgetFirst: Set a budget above to see a funding target.
shopRow.noReceiveAddress: No receive address from hub yet.
shopRow.boughtAria: Marked bought. Click to undo confirmation.

petRow.skipAria: Skip marked. Click to undo confirmation.
